title: hieracium murorum subsp. multangulum
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. multangulum is a lesser-known subspecies of the Hawkweed plant, which belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hieracium murorum subsp. multangulum include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as supporting the immune system and digestive health. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential benefits and applications.
